notes: Alpha public build. Older alpha builds must install this version to receive in-app SHA-verified self-updates and Ready-panel mod application launch buttons. This installer includes the runtime app, operational README, required notices, WebView2 loader, bundled archive extractor, Dev Panel list-version and mod-application authoring, and Ready updates based only on higher online list versions. The installer is unsigned, so Windows SmartScreen may show a warning until code signing is added.
